_provenance.captured_from: tests/fixtures/accounting/pendle_pt/expected_baseline.sqlite (VIB-5314 real-fork PT buy->hold->sell round-trip on Arbitrum; same DB as the ratchet fixture)
_provenance.note: Real-Anvil baseline (same DB the check-accounting-ratchet gate scores). HONEST FLOOR — PEN1/2/4/5/6 PASS (acquisition basis, entry economics, FIFO-matched realized yield in true USD via VIB-5314, lifecycle continuity, PT-quantity conservation). PEN3 XFAIL = open-PT mark-to-market: the cell predicate is hardcoded XFAIL pending the gateway PT implied-price path (VIB-5276, Triage); VIB-5313 wired the valuer to consume that price but the frozen fixture was captured on a fork without the gateway PT price, so the open-PT carries no cost_basis_usd/unrealized_pnl_usd. G1/G3/G6 FAIL = generic cells do not yet read the typed PendleAccountingEvent (PT swaps are not SwapEventPayload rows and the PT leg has no USD valuation on the fork); the PT economics ARE captured and proven by PEN1/PEN4 (PEN-cell coverage is the contract, not the generic SWAP cells). G11 SKIP = no failed intents in the round-trip. G14/G15/L5_22 XFAIL = Track-C / registry-mode not on for this run (same shape as every other primitive's frozen fixture).
